summary: Added missing 'Host GPUs' and 'Proxy' tabs to LLM Servers page. Updated tab navigation in LlmServers.razor to include 4 tabs: General (tab 0), Host GPUs (tab 1), Deployments (tab 2), Proxy (tab 3). Added Host GPUs section that allows GPU inspection for GPU hosts and container detection. Added Proxy tab with a link to open the dedicated Proxy page (/proxy). Tab index variable updated to support all 4 tabs. Removed conflicting comment and added clean navigation method.
test_summary: This is a UI/Blazor component addition. No tests run - verification via code review and syntax validation.
codebase_learnings: Uses Blazor server-side components with .razor files
Tab navigation using TabButton and conditional sections based on activeTabIndex
State management with private fields and StateHasChanged() for reactivity
Navigation via Navigation.NavigateTo() for external routes
CSS classes for styling are in separate .razor.css files
Boiler-plate .cshtml syntax with @code block for code-behind

worked_well: Understood the existing tab structure pattern from LlmServers.razor
Identified the correct location to add new tab sections
Added the missing state variable for GPU inspection
Properly separated the Navigation.NavigateTo call from the lifecycle method
agent_retro.potential_improvement: Could add integration tests later for the tab switching functionality
